llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9.3 pulled - brought to board member's attention, being reviewed by staff, will be brought back at next meeting. Staff recognition (11.1) discussed for moving up but not moved.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: If there are no questions, can I please get a motion to approve
